name: Feature Request

labels: enhancement

## Summary

<!-- A clear, concise description of the feature or enhancement you are proposing -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What gap does it fill? -->
<!-- e.g., "There is no way to rotate secrets for a specific tenant without..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you have in mind. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Affected Component(s)

<!-- Which service(s), agent(s), or extension(s) would this touch? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered other approaches? Why is this the preferred one? -->

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- How will we know this feature is complete and working correctly? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any relevant docs, links, prior art, or screenshots -->
